The '''''Sable II''''' was a [[DP20 gunship/Legends|Corellian gunship]] commandeered by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Karn Granzor]]. It was destroyed in battle with the [[Sable III|''Anto's Star'']] which was manned by former crewmembers of ''Sable II''.<ref name="SaD" />
